executives.name: Amanda Chow
executives.background: Amanda Chow is a CPA, CMA with over 20 years of experience in the resource sector, focusing on financial reporting and compliance.

executives.name: David Billard
executives.background: David Billard is a P.Geo. and the Head of Exploration for Skyharbour. He is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and development, particularly in the Athabasca Basin. He has worked with companies like Cameco and JNR Resources.

executives.name: Don Huston
executives.background: Don Huston has been associated with the mineral exploration industry for over 30 years and has extensive experience in field operations and management.

executives.name: Jordan Trimble
executives.background: Jordan Trimble is the President and CEO of Skyharbour Resources. He has worked in the resource industry in various capacities with numerous TSX Venture listed companies and has a background in corporate finance and management. He has been instrumental in the growth and development of Skyharbour and has helped raise significant capital for the company.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

executives.name: Joseph Gallucci
executives.background: Joseph Gallucci is a senior executive with over 20 years of experience in investment banking and capital markets, specifically in the mining sector.

executives.name: Richard Kusmirski
executives.background: Mr. Kusmirski has over 45 years of experience in the exploration industry and was formerly the President of JNR Resources Inc.

executives.name: Nicholas Revere
executives.background: Nicholas Revere is the VP of Corporate Development. He has experience in the financial markets and corporate communications within the resource sector.

board_of_directors.background: Don Huston has been associated with the mineral exploration industry for over 30 years and has extensive experience in field operations and management.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Gallucci
board_of_directors.background: Joseph Gallucci is a senior executive with over 20 years of experience in investment banking and capital markets, specifically in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Kusmirski
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kusmirski has over 45 years of experience in the exploration industry and was formerly the President of JNR Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: David Cates
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cates is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Denison and serves on the Board of Directors. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) and holds a Master of Accounting (MAcc) and a Bachelor of Arts (BA) degree from the University of Waterloo. Prior to his appointment as President and CEO, he served as Denison's Vice President Finance and Chief Financial Officer.
